book.destination: restaurant that the user will book
book.departure: accommodation that the user will book

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to dine. The restaurant should serve asian oriental food and should be in the centre
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 17:00 on wednesday
If the booking fails how about 16:00
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the north and should include free wifi
The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free parking
If there is no such hotel, how about one that is in the centre
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 2 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to make sure it arrives the restaurant by the booked time
Make sure you get contact number and car type
